Detailed Description

Implementation of exact edge/surface integrals and K1–K4 kernels.

Definition in file SingSub.cpp.

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ SURFTHRESH

#define SURFTHRESH   1e-8

Numerical threshold for detecting points lying near an edge or plane.

Used in geometric tests to treat points within 1e-8 of a surface as being on the surface.
